title: 从体制内到打零工，一个985名校硕士不上班的九年 | 原文
content: A 985 master's graduate worked for a decade at a state-affiliated publisher with flexible hours. After having a child in 2015, she left to become a stay-at-home parent, supporting herself through freelance work and later gig jobs like dog-walking and pet-sitting. She reflects on her nine years outside formal employment, acknowledging lost financial security and career prospects, yet finding personal fulfillment in an unconventional path she chose freely.

title: OthmanAdi/planning-with-files
content: Persistent file-based planning system for AI coding agents. Uses crash-proof markdown plans that survive context loss, with deterministic completion gates and multi-agent shared state on disk. Compatible with Claude Code, Codex CLI, Cursor, Kiro, OpenCode and 60+ agents via the SKILL.md standard. Python project with 24,552 stars and 2,104 forks.

title: 奶奶删了 77 万条未读又来 3 万，微信承诺异常企业微信拉群将强制确认
content: An 88-year-old woman accumulated 770,000 unread WeChat messages, mostly from enterprise WeChat groups promoting health products. She had added 1,200 enterprise accounts and was automatically pulled into 1,900+ groups under 40 members, which require no user consent. Her family temporarily contained the issue by switching to "minor mode." WeChat committed to implementing mandatory confirmation for abnormal enterprise accounts adding users to groups. China has 173 million internet users aged 60+, but only 20.3% possess basic digital literacy skills.

title: 请教一下 plus 过期了，续订里的价格还是 500 里拉。但是有 Your payment method was declined 的红字，我还能买礼品卡续订吗
content: A user asks whether they can renew a subscription with a gift card after getting a "payment method declined" error, even though the renewal price still shows 500 lira. Another user confirms having the same situation: the error appears because a previous automatic charge failed after the subscription expired, but they successfully renewed using a 500 lira gift card. The original poster seeks confirmation that the declined payment warning is only for the past failed charge and won't affect using a regional gift card for future renewal.

title: Web-based cryptography is always snake oil
content: Web-based cryptography is fundamentally insecure. Security experts classify client-side encryption in browsers as "snake oil"—appearing effective but actually worthless. javaScript crypto delivered over HTTP/HTTPS cannot be trusted, as servers can alter code, browsers have vulnerabilities, and certificate authorities can be compromised. True encryption requires endpoints users control, not intermediaries.

title: MiniMax M3：一家AI公司，为什么开始重新定义自己的价值？
content: MiniMax's M3 release signals a shift in how AI companies define their value. Previously, firms competed on model intelligence and benchmark rankings. Now, MiniMax emphasizes task completion metrics—bug fixing, browser automation, terminal operations, and enterprise system integration. This reflects a broader industry evolution from selling intelligence to selling workflow capabilities. The new competitive landscape centers on productivity and embedding AI into business processes, creating stronger commercial moats through data retention, system integration, and user habits. MiniMax now competes not just with model makers but with enterprise software platforms for control of workplace productivity.

title: 2026游戏行业最绝望的战争
content: Gaming costs are rising sharply as hardware makers break from decades of price-cut traditions. Since 2020, PlayStation, Xbox, Nintendo, and PC components have all increased prices despite aging hardware, as semiconductor firms prioritize AI data centers over consumer GPUs. US game spending reached $60.7 billion in 2025, but growth concentrates in subscriptions and mobile games rather than new experiences. Hardware sales hit 30-year lows in volume while average prices nearly doubled since 2019. Platforms now favor exclusives and established IPs over innovation. Rising logistics costs, currency fluctuations, and tariffs amplify the squeeze. Success increasingly depends on capital efficiency and distinct creative identity rather than blockbuster budgets.

Dan Bin of Oriental Harbor delivered a speech at Tsinghua University, with ten key quotes summarized by Private Equity Ranking Network. The original content is available via video link. No substantive financial or investment details are provided in this reference title.

title: CVE-2026-46242 (Bad Epoll) 可在浏览器沙盒及安卓触发的提权漏洞
content: CVE-2026-46242 is a Linux kernel privilege escalation vulnerability caused by an epoll race condition bug. It affects Android devices (kernel 6.6+) and can be triggered within the Chrome sandbox, potentially allowing attackers to gain root access through web browsing. No fix is currently available, though proof-of-concept code has not been publicly released.

title: 兆易创新不碰制造凭什么值5000亿？
content:
GigaDevice is a fabless chip design company with no manufacturing facilities, specializing in NOR Flash (global #2), SLC NAND, niche DRAM, and MCUs. Founded in 2005, it strategically entered markets that Samsung and other giants ignored due to small market sizes.

Its DRAM production relies on Changxin, a separate entity founded by the same entrepreneur, where GigaDevice holds only 1.8% equity. The two are linked through substantial but shrinking foundry arrangements. GigaDevice's profits fluctuate dramatically based on when larger competitors shift capacity to higher-margin products like HBM, leaving niche markets—what analysts call "shadow cycles."

Its current valuation (~487.5B RMB) packs three components: cyclical earnings from tight supply, option value from custom chip ventures, and speculative premium from Changxin's upcoming IPO. The company lacks pricing power over its own destiny.

title: 全美第二，又一个巨头宣布破产
content: Dish DBS and subsidiary Dish Wireless filed for prepackaged bankruptcy after a $20 billion debt payment came due before a $20.25 billion spectrum sale to AT&T could close due to regulatory delays. The restructuring, approved by over 80% of creditors, will halve Dish DBS's debt from $9.75 billion to $5 billion and excludes consumer services like Dish TV and Sling TV, which continue normal operations. Founder Charlie Ergen resumed leadership to oversee the transition. The bankruptcy represents a strategic pivot for the 40-year-old satellite television provider, which has lost subscribers to streaming services and invested over $46 billion in spectrum assets to transform into a wireless operator. The company expects to exit bankruptcy this quarter upon AT&T transaction completion.

title: 天下苦DRAM久矣
content: DRAM prices have surged dramatically—server DDR5 costs rose 3.5× and may reach 5× by late 2026—as AI-driven HBM demand consumes 25% of DRAM wafer capacity. This crisis is spurring four alternative approaches: AMD acquired MEXT for AI-powered memory tiering that offloads cold data to cheaper NAND, boosting effective capacity 2-4×; Apple uses sparse activation to run 20-billion-parameter models with only 2-8GB DRAM by storing weights in flash; Marvell's CXL controllers with hardware compression deliver 2-3.6× logical memory expansion; and Sandisk's HBF stacks NAND directly under GPUs for 8-16× HBM capacity. All paths reconstruct memory hierarchies, moving warm/cold data from expensive DRAM/HBM toward flash layers.

title: 这几天用 AI 撸了个 PDF 翻译平台，没写一行代码
content: A developer built a complete PDF translation SaaS platform called "译档" (YiDang) in about five days without writing any code, using AI for all programming tasks. The platform preserves PDF formatting during translation, offers side-by-side preview, token-based billing with refunds for failures, WeChat Pay integration, public API with key management, and offline demo mode. The project includes a FastAPI backend, React frontend, translation CLI engine, tests, and documentation. The creator aimed to test whether a solo developer could launch a full SaaS in 2025 with minimal human effort beyond product decisions.

title: 本周：人类究竟需要多少数据中心
content: Current North American data center capacity is ~20GW, with ~30GW expected by 2027. Leading AI figures project 100-1000GW needed long-term, with just Anthropic and OpenAI requiring 100GW by 2030. At conservative estimates, only 10-20% of required capacity exists today. Two key indicators support continued investment: frontier AI capabilities still improving, and per-token costs declining exponentially. AI-driven value extends beyond native AI revenue to include traditional business transformations like Meta's AI-enhanced advertising. Supply constraints will persist as prime data center locations are exhausted and physical buildout faces delays.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 门捷列夫学徒

title: 股价下跌96%，奈雪把自己的高端标签“作没了”
content: Naixue's stock has plunged 96% from its peak, with four years of losses since its 2021 IPO. Revenue dropped 12% to 4.3 billion yuan in 2025. The premium brand abandoned its core identity: replacing freshly baked artisan breads with pre-made products, shrinking flagship stores, cutting prices amid consumer downgrading, and belatedly embracing franchising with minimal growth. Strategic indecision—simultaneously chasing health trends, premium positioning, and value pricing—has diluted its differentiation without establishing a clear new identity, leaving consumers without a compelling reason to choose Naixue over competitors.
很朴实，也很有效。别人只是在讲自己种地的心得，评论一片谩骂。

content: A Sichuan education consultant, Liu, deleted a student's university entrance exam applications out of revenge after the family canceled his services. The student missed undergraduate admission opportunities. Liu was sentenced to eight months for sabotaging computer information systems. The court granted leniency because Liu confessed and pled guilty. The family had shared login credentials with Liu, then hired someone else to file the applications without informing him.

content: A French supermarket saw chaotic scenes as customers rushed to buy discounted air conditioners during a heatwave. The store's glass doors were shattered in the crush, and multiple shoppers fought on the ground. Only ten units were available, sparking the violent scramble.

content: He Tingbo released the Taolaw V2 paper on July 3, formally disclosing key technical details for the first time. The Taolaw represents a systematic upgrade beyond 3D stacking, addressing CPU frequency, parasitic capacitance, power distribution, and thermal management. The paper reveals chip roadmaps and measured data: Kirin 2026 achieves 238 MTr/mm² transistor density, 13% higher frequency, 41% lower power consumption, and 37.5% smaller area. Advanced packaging specifications are quantified for the first time, with bonding pitch ≤2μm. Huawei's optical interconnect vision includes 8Tb/s bandwidth modules by 2028. The roadmap also maintains advanced process node development, with projections that China's gap could narrow by 5 years within 5 years.

title: 中年男人的“败家三件套”，观鸟排第一？
content: Birdwatching has become a popular and increasingly expensive hobby among middle-aged Chinese men. Enthusiasts often wake before dawn carrying heavy equipment into parks and wetlands, sometimes spending tens of thousands of yuan on premium binoculars, cameras, and long lenses. The community has developed its own culture with humorous nicknames for birds and informal "species collecting" competitions. Despite frequent failed attempts to spot birds, participants value the activity's contrast to modern life's constant stimulation. Birdwatching induces "flow" states through patient waiting, deepens awareness of urban nature—Beijing records 519 bird species—and connects practitioners to ancient Chinese poetic traditions of observing birds and seasonal changes.

title: 现场媒体眼中的美版世界杯：体育场世界一流，票价很荒诞
content: Journalists covering the 2026 World Cup in the US praise the world-class stadiums and friendly atmosphere but criticize high costs and organizational challenges. Expanded to 48 teams, the tournament features more matches but greater travel distances between cities, reducing the communal fan experience. Reporters highlight expensive tickets as absurd and exclusionary, with some matches reaching historically high prices. Hydration breaks disrupt game flow unnecessarily. While American soccer culture lacks the intensity of European or South American fandom, the positive, family-friendly environment appeals to many. Visa delays, sparse photography access for freelancers, and extreme heat also draw complaints. Italy's absence disappoints its media representatives.

title: 比亚迪造人形机器人：降维打击，还是进入无人区？
content: BYD confirmed developing humanoid robots in June 2026, with its executive VP citing automotive AI synergies and potential dealer network sales. While BYD denied specific rumors about codenames and production numbers, it did not dispute the project itself. The company has secretly pursued robotics since 2022, including hiring for embodied intelligence roles. Among competitors, Unitree leads with verified 2025 shipments of 5,500 humanoid robots and approved IPO; AgiBot shows rapid scaling but with broader product categories; Xpeng faces organizational restructuring; and Tesla's million-unit production plans remain unfulfilled announcements.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 凤凰爱江山

title: 豆包：智能体功能将于 7 月 15 日下线
content: Doubao will shut down its AI agent feature on July 15, 2026, due to product adjustments. Users can view and save agent information and conversation history for a limited time afterward; after October 15, 2026, data will be permanently inaccessible. Users are advised to back up important content in advance. AI agents are customizable interactive characters created on Doubao for work, life, and entertainment purposes.

title: 消息称苹果带摄像头 AirPods Pro 项目「暂停」，距量产仅一步之遥
content: Apple has paused development of camera-equipped AirPods Pro (code-named H90), which were nearing mass production after nearly four years of R&D. The project, already delayed to 2027 due to AI optimization challenges, reportedly stalled because EU privacy regulations require explicit consent from all individuals whose biometric and environmental data is collected in public spaces—a practical impossibility. The earbuds featured low-resolution infrared sensors for AI-powered visual intelligence, gesture recognition, and spatial audio with Apple Vision Pro, with elongated stems to accommodate the hardware.

title: 只要养成这种心态，你就一定能成功
content: An "I can do anything" mindset transforms lives by rejecting self-imposed limitations. The author exemplifies this through personal career leaps and historical cases: Ferdinand Demara performed complex surgeries as a fake naval surgeon by learning on the spot, and 16-year-old Boyan Slat founded The Ocean Cleanup despite experts calling ocean cleanup impossible. Success requires combining bold belief with systematic action—defining clear goals, building daily habits, and treating failure as temporary feedback rather than permanent stigma. The sole barriers to achievement are internal narratives and social conditioning that obscure abundant opportunities.

转自AI智能探长：《硅谷顶级投资人纳瓦尔圆桌爆猛料：软件被AI吃掉，硬件被中国拿下！AI只剩两王争霸，未来3年推理算力暴涨9万倍》，链接：网页链接

title: 用 HK 节点 使用 Codex 时老是出现： stream disconnected before completion: tls handshake eof
content:
我发现我的机场 HK 节点虽然访问网站啥的很稳定也很快，但是在 Codex 中老是出现这个问题，好像是 ws 连接不上，然后切到 http 进行工作了。 但是我切到 JP 节点这个问题就少一些，但是我的 JP 节点整体不如 HK 快和稳定。

不知道你们有没有这个问题？你们使用…

title: 3 种东西别随便放空气炸锅，堪比炸弹，有娃家庭尤其要注意 | 原文
content: Three items should never go in air fryers due to explosion risks, especially hazardous for families with children: food wrapped in paper, whole eggs in shell, and lightweight foods that can be blown into the heating element. Paper can ignite, eggs build pressure and burst, and light foods may catch fire when contacting hot coils. Following safety guidelines prevents kitchen fires and injuries.

title: Command and Conquer Generals natively ported to macOS, iPhone, iPad using Fable
content: The classic real-time strategy game Command and Conquer Generals has been natively ported to macOS, iPhone, and iPad using the Fable game engine. This enables the title to run directly on Apple silicon devices without emulation.

title: 娃哈哈一茶饮检测出甜蜜素，遭美国 FDA「进口警报」
content: The U.S. FDA detained a Wahaha black tea and lemon-flavored tea beverage produced on April 6, 2026, after detecting cyclamate, a banned food additive in the United States. A source close to Wahaha stated the product meets Chinese standards and that a distributor exported it without authorization. The company is still investigating. Wahaha has not issued an official response to media inquiries.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 快科技

感谢各位

AI investing is shifting from model makers to infrastructure enablers. Key trends: (1) open-source models are commoditizing AI, making proprietary data control the main competitive edge; (2) "sovereign AI"—running open models on private infrastructure—is accelerating; (3) distributed deployments actually increase total GPU demand despite efficiency losses; (4) OpenAI pivots to B2C subscriptions while Anthropic targets vertical software; (5) structural winners include Palantir (enterprise AI deployment), Alphabet and Tesla (physical world data), and Nvidia (full-stack compute ecosystem).
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 但斌

title: 3Blue1Brown创始人：为什么AI能破解80年的数学猜想，却还写不好一篇文章？ | 原文
content: Grant Sanderson, founder of the math education YouTube channel 3Blue1Brown, discussed AI and mathematics on the Dwarkesh Patel podcast in July 2026. Sanderson studied math and computer science at Stanford, worked at Khan Academy, and has run 3Blue1Brown full-time since 2016. He is currently producing a documentary series interviewing mathematicians about recent AI advances in mathematics, which began filming in mid-2025.
